title: U.S. Hogs and Pigs Inventory Up 7 Percent
summary: As of March 1, there were 65.9 million hogs and pigs on U.S. farms, up 7 percent from March 2014, but down slightly from December 1, 2014, according to the Quarterly Hogs and Pigs report published today by the U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS).

title: Cantwell Avalanche Accident Report is Out
summary: The Cantwell avalanche accident report is finished. Please take a few minutes to read and share this with your crew. Some valuable lessons to be learned in light of this tragic accident, no matter what your mode of travel is in the backcountry. A huge thanks to the witnesses/rescuers for sharing thi...
